nasb.text: So the king of Egypt called for the midwives and said to them, “Why have you done this thing, and let the boys live?”

esv.text: So the king of Egypt called the midwives and said to them, “Why have you done this, and let the male children live?”

cnv.text: 於是，埃及王把接生婦叫了來，對她們說：“你們為甚麼作這事，讓男孩活著呢？”

ccb.text: 埃及王召见那两个接生婆，质问她们：“你们为什么这样做？为什么让男婴活着？”
